image:image.image:title: TandPay — Escrow for safe social commerce in Rwanda with MTN Mobile Money
image:image.image:caption: TandPay escrow platform homepage banner — safe buying and selling on WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, and Facebook in Rwanda

image:image.image:title: TandPay mobile checkout screen — pay via MTN MoMo escrow
image:image.image:caption: TandPay buyer checkout interface showing product payment via MTN Mobile Money in Rwanda

image:image.image:title: TandPay escrow protects both buyer and seller in Rwanda
image:image.image:caption: Illustration showing how TandPay escrow holds payment until delivery is confirmed

image:image.image:title: TandPay payment protection shield — secure MTN MoMo escrow
image:image.image:caption: Security shield representing TandPay buyer payment protection via escrow

image:image.image:title: TandPay delivery rider with 4-digit confirmation code
image:image.image:caption: Delivery rider carrying TandPay unique delivery code for proof of delivery in Rwanda

image:image.image:title: Buyer confirms delivery on TandPay — seller gets paid via MoMo
image:image.image:caption: Buyer entering delivery confirmation code on TandPay to release seller payment
